content:
# Faunal Turnover

**Summary**: The replacement of one set of species by another in a biological community.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] analyzed faunal turnover rates to determine how quickly species responded to the K/Pg boundary event.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] Used to identify the impact of mass extinction events on marine ecosystems.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024]] Comparison of faunal assemblages across a geological boundary.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- A sudden decrease in abundance and diversity occurred at the clay layer, indicating a catastrophic event. ([[2024-hikmahtiar|Hikmahtiar, 2024, p. 35]])
